name: literal_union_two_substring_pick_first
description: M3a pick_best: homogeneous string-literal union ("foo" | "bar"), pairwise match-disjoint, with ARRAY input ["foo","bar"]. Each arm stringifies the array Display "[foo, bar]" (ObjectToString 2) and substring-matches its literal (SubstringMatch 2) => score 4 each. Two successes tie on score, so pick_best picks the lower index (arm 0, "foo"). want live-captured.
